code_dossier.name: DeleteUserResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that represents the response structure for user deletion operations in the account management system. It extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields like status code and message.

data.detailed_description:
DeleteUserResponse is a simple DTO (Data Transfer Object) class designed to encapsulate the response data returned after a user deletion operation in the account management system.

**Functional Overview:**
This class serves as a response wrapper for delete user API operations. By extending BaseResponse, it inherits:
- `code`: A ToBCodeEnum representing the operation result status
- `message`: A human-readable message describing the operation outcome

**Business Logic:**
The class itself contains no additional business logic or fields beyond what BaseResponse provides. This suggests that user deletion operations return only a success/failure status without additional data payloads. This is a common and appropriate pattern for DELETE operations in RESTful APIs.

**Design Pattern:**
The class follows the inheritance-based DTO pattern, leveraging BaseResponse as a common response structure. This ensures consistency across all API responses in the system and allows for future extension if deletion-specific response fields are needed (e.g., deleted user ID confirmation, deletion timestamp, etc.).

**Architecture Position:**
Located in the `dto` package under `account-api`, this class sits in the API layer and serves as a contract between the account management service and its clients. It's part of the response model hierarchy used for serialization/deserialization in API communications.
responsibilities: Encapsulate the response structure for user deletion API operations
Provide a type-safe response wrapper that can be extended with deletion-specific fields in the future
Ensure API response consistency by inheriting from the standardized BaseResponse class
Serve as a data contract for serialization between service and client layers

interfaces.name: DeleteUserResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class extending BaseResponse for user deletion operation responses. Inherits code (ToBCodeEnum) and message (String) fields from parent class.
